title: The Workshop
description: A quiet morning in father's workshop. The gears turn, the machines hum, and everything feels safe.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You are standing in the front hall of the home you grew up in. Morning light streams through the windows in the kitchen behind you. The door to your father's study is closed. That's odd.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Good morning, Vera! Did you sleep well?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I did, thank you, but I thought I heard strange noises...

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: I heard them too! I think they came from the study.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Da's been working on something new. He seems... distracted. Worried, even.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You approach the study door. The machine that controls the lock has been disconnected.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: No point in trying to start the day on an empty stomach. Who's for a cup of tea?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: No time for tea! Look, the gears are disconnected.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: You approach the study door. After a moment's effort, the lock mechanism gives way. The door swings open.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Da never leaves his door like this. Why would he—

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: You step inside. Papers scattered everywhere. Books pulled from shelves. And the chair... empty.

choices.text: We should reconnect the gear system open the door

puzzle.title: The Study Lock
puzzle.instructions: The gears controlling the study door are disconnected. Connect them to unlock the door.

choices.text: But first, a cup of tea would be nice.

puzzle.title: Brewing Comfort
puzzle.instructions: Serve tea to the guests before their patience runs out!
